list.name: 更改
list.comment:
feat(architecture): implement secure multi-page routing and nested comment engine
- Decoupled single-page testing environment into dedicated physical routes (dashboard, add-brew, records, brew-details). - Engineered `auth-guard.js` to enforce global session security and intercept unauthorized URL navigation. - Implemented dynamic URL parameter extraction (`?id=`) for precise single-document data fetching. - Developed a scalable One-to-Many NoSQL relational schema for the community comment engine. - Resolved asynchronous session restoration race conditions by transitioning to event-driven `onAuthStateChanged` observers. - docs: Compiled and appended the comprehensive mid-term Progress Report documenting systemic pivots and project milestones.

task.summary:
feat(backend): integrate firebase auth with firestore and implement server-side category filtering
- Eradicated hardcoded seller metadata by dynamically binding `sellerUid` to `auth.currentUser.uid`. - Implemented a global authentication session observer using `onAuthStateChanged` to secure database write operations. - Added developer authentication simulation tools (`signInAnonymously` and `signOut`) within the test environment. - Engineered server-side query filtration logic (`getListingsByCategory`) and single-document retrieval (`getListingById`). - Resolved index latency by provisioning cloud-side B-Tree Composite Indexes for compound state queries. - Updated all core scripts (`firebase-config.js`, `db-services.js`, `test.js`, `app.js`) to full-text English documentation standards.

feat(backend): integrate firebase auth with firestore and implement server-side category filtering
- Eradicated hardcoded seller metadata by dynamically binding `sellerUid` to `auth.currentUser.uid`. - Implemented a global authentication session observer using `onAuthStateChanged` to secure database write operations. - Added developer authentication simulation tools (`signInAnonymously` and `signOut`) within the test environment. - Engineered server-side query filtration logic (`getListingsByCategory`) and single-document retrieval (`getListingById`). - Resolved index latency by provisioning cloud-side B-Tree Composite Indexes for compound state queries. - Updated all core scripts (`firebase-config.js`, `db-services.js`, `test.js`, `app.js`) to full-text English documentation standards.

feat(backend): integrate firebase auth with firestore and implement server-side category filtering
- Eradicated hardcoded seller metadata by dynamically binding `sellerUid` to `auth.currentUser.uid`. - Implemented a global authentication session observer using `onAuthStateChanged` to secure database write operations. - Added developer authentication simulation tools (`signInAnonymously` and `signOut`) within the test environment. - Engineered server-side query filtration logic (`getListingsByCategory`) and single-document retrieval (`getListingById`). - Resolved index latency by provisioning cloud-side B-Tree Composite Indexes for compound state queries. - Updated all core scripts (`firebase-config.js`, `db-services.js`, `test.js`, `app.js`) to full-text English documentation standards.

refactor!(database): complete architectural pivot to beverage brewing system
- Transitioned system domain from e-commerce to a specialized NoSQL beverage brewing log. - Redesigned Firestore schema to utilize complex nested data maps (`basics`, `parameters`, `review`). - Engineered `submitBrewLog` API enforcing strict authentication checks and user UID binding. - Implemented `getTopRatedBrews` logic using server-side `orderBy` index sorting for dynamic leaderboards. - Overhauled `index.html` and `app.js` to construct the new data ingestion pipeline and UI rendering. - Rewrote `README.md` to reflect the new project scope, core features, and updated team roles.
BREAKING CHANGE: The previous marketplace UI, `listings` collection, and related APIs are completely deprecated and replaced by the `brews` architecture.

refactor!(database): complete architectural pivot to beverage brewing system
- Transitioned system domain from e-commerce to a specialized NoSQL beverage brewing log. - Redesigned Firestore schema to utilize complex nested data maps (`basics`, `parameters`, `review`). - Engineered `submitBrewLog` API enforcing strict authentication checks and user UID binding. - Implemented `getTopRatedBrews` logic using server-side `orderBy` index sorting for dynamic leaderboards. - Overhauled `index.html` and `app.js` to construct the new data ingestion pipeline and UI rendering. - Rewrote `README.md` to reflect the new project scope, core features, and updated team roles.
BREAKING CHANGE: The previous marketplace UI, `listings` collection, and related APIs are completely deprecated and replaced by the `brews` architecture.

feat(architecture): implement secure multi-page routing and nested comment engine
- Decoupled single-page testing environment into dedicated physical routes (dashboard, add-brew, records, brew-details). - Engineered `auth-guard.js` to enforce global session security and intercept unauthorized URL navigation. - Implemented dynamic URL parameter extraction (`?id=`) for precise single-document data fetching. - Developed a scalable One-to-Many NoSQL relational schema for the community comment engine. - Resolved asynchronous session restoration race conditions by transitioning to event-driven `onAuthStateChanged` observers. - docs: Compiled and appended the comprehensive mid-term Progress Report documenting systemic pivots and project milestones.

MESSAGE.value:
feat(backend): integrate firebase auth with firestore and implement server-side category filtering
- Eradicated hardcoded seller metadata by dynamically binding `sellerUid` to `auth.currentUser.uid`. - Implemented a global authentication session observer using `onAuthStateChanged` to secure database write operations. - Added developer authentication simulation tools (`signInAnonymously` and `signOut`) within the test environment. - Engineered server-side query filtration logic (`getListingsByCategory`) and single-document retrieval (`getListingById`). - Resolved index latency by provisioning cloud-side B-Tree Composite Indexes for compound state queries. - Updated all core scripts (`firebase-config.js`, `db-services.js`, `test.js`, `app.js`) to full-text English documentation standards.

refactor!(database): complete architectural pivot to beverage brewing system
- Transitioned system domain from e-commerce to a specialized NoSQL beverage brewing log. - Redesigned Firestore schema to utilize complex nested data maps (`basics`, `parameters`, `review`). - Engineered `submitBrewLog` API enforcing strict authentication checks and user UID binding. - Implemented `getTopRatedBrews` logic using server-side `orderBy` index sorting for dynamic leaderboards. - Overhauled `index.html` and `app.js` to construct the new data ingestion pipeline and UI rendering. - Rewrote `README.md` to reflect the new project scope, core features, and updated team roles.
BREAKING CHANGE: The previous marketplace UI, `listings` collection, and related APIs are completely deprecated and replaced by the `brews` architecture.

feat(architecture): implement secure multi-page routing and nested comment engine
- Decoupled single-page testing environment into dedicated physical routes (dashboard, add-brew, records, brew-details). - Engineered `auth-guard.js` to enforce global session security and intercept unauthorized URL navigation. - Implemented dynamic URL parameter extraction (`?id=`) for precise single-document data fetching. - Developed a scalable One-to-Many NoSQL relational schema for the community comment engine. - Resolved asynchronous session restoration race conditions by transitioning to event-driven `onAuthStateChanged` observers. - docs: Compiled and appended the comprehensive mid-term Progress Report documenting systemic pivots and project milestones.

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value:
feat(architecture): implement secure multi-page routing and nested comment engine
- Decoupled single-page testing environment into dedicated physical routes (dashboard, add-brew, records, brew-details). - Engineered `auth-guard.js` to enforce global session security and intercept unauthorized URL navigation. - Implemented dynamic URL parameter extraction (`?id=`) for precise single-document data fetching. - Developed a scalable One-to-Many NoSQL relational schema for the community comment engine. - Resolved asynchronous session restoration race conditions by transitioning to event-driven `onAuthStateChanged` observers. - docs: Compiled and appended the comprehensive mid-term Progress Report documenting systemic pivots and project milestones.
